channel.title: Hugo on m0nkeyc0de's brain dump
channel.description: Recent content in Hugo on m0nkeyc0de's brain dump

item.title: Hugo Cheat Sheet
item.description:
Quick command reference for using Hugo day to day.

Run in local

hugo server -D

Add a post with hugo command

hugo new posts/hugo_cheat_sheet.md

Add a post manually in contents/posts/new_post.md

---
title: "New Post"
date: 2024-01-21
slug: new_post
type: posts
draft: true
categories:
  - default
tags:
  - default
---
